task: aggregation optimization in GNN-based recommender systems
input: user-item interaction graph (optionally with knowledge graph)
output: optimized user and item embeddings for recommendation
backbone: dual policy learning (two Deep-Q-Networks) + base GNN-R (e.g., LightGCN, KGAT)
loss: reinforcement learning reward (based on recommendation performance)
key_idea: use dual policy learning with two DQNs to adaptively determine high-order aggregation for users and items
datasets: six real-world datasets (not named in abstract)
